project.title: KindredPaws
project.tagline: I rescued a tiny abandoned animal, raised it with love, became emotionally attached to it, and together we made the real world a better place.
project.elevatorPitch: An emotionally intelligent AI virtual-pet mobile game where you adopt a rescued puppy or kitten, raise it from infancy to adulthood, bond with an AI companion that remembers you, and fund real animal shelters through play.

genre.primary: Cozy Sim + Virtual Pet + Live-Service Casual

project.coreLoop: receive notification -> open game -> check pet mood/needs -> interact (feed/play/talk) -> gain affection+rewards -> unlock growth/customization -> strengthen emotional bond -> return later
project.metaLoop: daily care -> relationship growth -> pet evolves/matures -> unlock stories/memories -> earn donation currency -> help real shelters -> feel meaningful impact -> continue caring
differentiators: AI Companion Layer (Heartmind): hybrid LLM dialogue with structured memory and evolving personality, always wholesome and child-safe
Voice Mimic Layer: pet imitates short player voice clips (DEFERRED, on-device DSP only)
Real-World Impact Layer: percentage of net revenue funds vetted real animal shelters with transparent impact reporting
Daily Life Integration (Companion Presence): widgets, notifications, streaks so the player feels 'my pet lives with me'

canonicalSource.name: KINDREDPAWS — CANONICAL DECISION BRIEF
canonicalSource.authority: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Where a specialist analysis conflicts with this brief, this brief wins. This current_state.json is the machine-readable mirror of that brief and the live project-state SSOT. Authority chain: KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md -> current_state.json -> the six downstream docs.
canonicalSource.note: All six downstream docs cross-link to the brief (by the exact filename KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md) and this file; they do not redefine canonical facts.

canonicalFilenameMap.note: The ONE canonical on-disk filename per document. Every cross-link in every doc MUST use these exact strings. Invented/legacy aliases (e.g. GAME_DESIGN_SYSTEMS.md, GAME_ECONOMY_MONETIZATION.md, GAME_ART_AUDIO_BIBLE.md, GAME_GTM_VIRALITY.md, GAME_DESIGN.md, GAME_ECONOMY.md, GAME_ART_BIBLE.md, GAME_IMPACT_TRUST.md, GAME_AI_COMPANION.md, GAME_DONATION_IMPACT.md, GAME_GTM_LIVEOPS.md, AI_COMPANION_AND_SAFETY.md, ART_AUDIO_AND_ASSET_BUDGET.md, DONATION_TRUST_AND_IMPACT.md, LIVEOPS_AND_GROWTH.md, GAME_IMPACT_DONATION.md, GAME_ART_ASSET_PLAN.md, GAME_DESIGN_SPEC.md, GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md, GAME_AI_COMPANION_SYSTEM.md, GAME_DONATION_IMPACT_SYSTEM.md, GAME_ART_ASSET_PRODUCTION.md, CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md) are RETIRED and must not appear.

assumptions.monetization: Hybrid F2P — ads + subscriptions + cosmetic purchases + donation-linked purchases
assumptions.audience: global casual players, pet lovers, Gen Z, socially conscious users
assumptions.timeline: 12–18 months to global launch (~16 months baseline)
assumptions.scopePhilosophy: minimum asset count, maximum emotional attachment
hardConstraints: realistically buildable by a solo founder + AI agents
NO full voice conversation in MVP
NO custom 3D animation pipeline in MVP
every major feature MUST pass the Fun-Per-Dollar framework
emotional attachment is more important than graphical fidelity
the game must feel premium despite low production cost
the roadmap must explicitly classify every major feature as MVP / Deferred / Removed / North-Star
assumptions.hardConstraintComplianceCheck: No multiplayer (North-Star), no UGC (North-Star), no open world, no full-voice conversation (Deferred), no custom-3D (Live2D only), voice mimic Deferred.

currentPhase.name: Pre-production
currentPhase.startState: Phase 0 START. Canonical Decision Brief v1.0 LOCKED and committed on-disk as KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md (the SSOT root). The six downstream documents have been drafted and now cross-link the brief and each other by their exact on-disk filenames. This current_state.json is the machine-readable SSOT mirror of the brief.

keyDeliverables: Live2D rig design locked via AI concept

exitGate.passCriteria: Brief ratified; rig contractor secured; LLM cost/DAU model shows < ARPDAU at projected mix; legal review booked.

criteriaProgress.llmCostModelUnderArpdau: MET — MVP 2.7% / soft-launch 3.9% of ARPDAU (< 35% gate). tool/llm_cost_model.dart, docs/LLM_UNIT_ECONOMICS_MODEL.md.
criteriaProgress.legalReviewBooked: PENDING (founder action) — review scope + question list delivered: docs/LEGAL_CHILD_DIRECTEDNESS_SCOPING.md.

exitGate.note: Engineering G0 deliverables complete; 2 criteria are founder/credentialed actions (secure paid rig contractor, book legal engagement) that cannot be performed by an agent — everything to enable them is delivered.

phases.name: Pre-production
phases.goal: Lock design, tech, legal frame, asset style.
keyDeliverables: Live2D rig design locked via AI concept
phases.exitGateSummary: Brief ratified; rig contractor secured; LLM cost/DAU model shows < ARPDAU at projected mix; legal review booked.

phases.name: Core-loop prototype
phases.goal: Prove the daily loop is fun on cheap assets.
phases.exitGateSummary: Internal playtest: core loop 'feels alive & cozy'; sim deterministic + offline-catch-up tested; no neglect-guilt present.

phases.name: Vertical slice
phases.goal: One polished, emotionally complete experience incl. AI.
keyDeliverables: Heartmind hybrid (pre-gen bank + structured memory + Memory Book)
phases.exitGateSummary: Hand-test of personas (Maya/Tom/David) hit 'would tell a friend'; AI memory callback lands reliably; rig pipeline cost on-budget (else cut 2nd species); spinner-free first AI line.

phases.name: MVP / Closed beta
phases.exitGateSummary: Closed beta D1>=40% / D7>=18%; no child-safety incident; cloud-save restore proven; LLM cost/DAU within model; legal green-light.

phases.name: Soft launch
phases.goal: Validate retention + unit economics in 2–3 markets.
keyDeliverables: live LLM gated pilot for adults
phases.exitGateSummary: D1>=42% / D7>=20% / D30>=10%; ARPDAU >= $0.03 and LLM cost/DAU < 35% of ARPDAU; >=1 viral Keepsake share/DAU-week; donation reconciliation clean.

phases.name: Global launch
phases.exitGateSummary: Soft-launch KPIs held at scale for 4 wks; infra cost/DAU stable; crash-free >=99.5%; donation transparency badge live.

phases.name: Live ops
phases.exitGateSummary: Recurring quarterly: D30 holding >=10%; sub conversion >=2%; donation volume + quarterly Impact Report published; content cadence sustainable solo+AI.

mvp.rationale: The player fantasy in one 60–90s scene; cheapest high-fun hook; reuses rig.
Retention engine; pure data; no-death floor.
Tactile daily verbs; tap + prop + reaction; 3 interactions only.
Highest FPD; literal quantification of attachment; near-free.
Payoff of 'raised it'; #1 art-cost lever — capped at 3 stages x 2 species.
Hybrid LLM-pre-generated bank + structured memory, NOT live free-form. Cost-gated.
Emotional payload + #1 viral moment; structured fact store is cheap.
Prompt-parameterized dials; ~0 marginal cost; deepens D30 bond.
Non-negotiable legal gate for any AI; FPD irrelevant.
Differentiator 3; cheapest form = % net-rev pledge to ONE vetted intermediary.
Converts policy into felt, shareable trust; data-driven dashboard.
S2S postbacks + receipt validation + attestation gate Coin minting.
Centerpiece of Companion Presence; primary re-engage for high-LTV cohort.
Cheapest retention lever; warm/invitational, never guilt. Local-first.
Cheap habit loop; MUST be forgiving (freeze/repair).
Makes pet feel alive; pure sequencing of existing assets.
Cosmetic monetization surface; 1 room + modular palette-swap kit only.
Primary non-sub revenue; overlay sprites; ~30 pieces at launch.
Financial keystone funding LLM OPEX; single tier.
F2P floor + donation funding; rewarded-first, kids see contextual/none.
K-factor engine; templated composition; 1-tap native share.
Losing the pet = catastrophic; prerequisite for memory/ledger/entitlements.
Global reach; AI-translate UI/copy; dialogue stays EN(+1–2) at first.

deferred.rationale: Gated behind age-verify + subscriber + caps + moderation; post-soft-launch.
Not the emotional core; child-voice privacy minefield; on-device pitch-shift only, post-launch.
Premature at MVP scale; add when volume/social justify.
Incremental over home widget; fast-follow once pipeline proven.
Inherently post-launch; MUST architect remote-config now.
Costliest expansion; breed palette-swaps first, new rig later.

removed.rationale: Contradicts cozy/safe core; fold 'comfort when sad' into mood.

northStar.rationale: Hard-constraint excluded; community impact counter is the only MVP proxy.
Hard-constraint excluded; lowest FPD; curated cosmetics meet expression need.

fpdFramework.definition: FPD = FUN (1–10: emotional impact + retention power + differentiation + virality) / DOLLAR (1–10: build effort + unique-asset cost + ongoing/LLM/infra cost + technical risk + maintenance load).

verdictBands.mvpIfSimplified: 1.0–1.49 (MVP only if simplified to cheapest emotionally-intact form)

fpdFramework.rule: Always specify the CHEAPEST VIABLE VERSION that preserves the emotional core.

gates.name: Pre-production gate
gates.passCriteria: Brief ratified; rig contractor secured; LLM cost/DAU model shows < ARPDAU at projected mix; legal review booked.

gates.name: Core-loop prototype gate
gates.passCriteria: Loop 'fun' qualitative pass; deterministic sim + offline-catch-up tests green; zero neglect-guilt.

gates.name: Vertical-slice gate
gates.passCriteria: Persona 'tell a friend' qualitative pass; AI memory callback reliability >=95% (no hallucinated facts); first-AI-line latency = 0 spinner; rig cost on-budget (else cut 2nd species).

gates.name: Closed-beta gate
gates.passCriteria: D1 >=40% · D7 >=18%; 0 child-safety incidents; cloud-restore proven; LLM cost/DAU within model; crash-free >=99%; legal green-light.

gates.name: Soft-launch gate
gates.passCriteria: D1 >=42% · D7 >=20% · D30 >=10%; ARPDAU >=$0.03; LLM cost/DAU < 35% ARPDAU; >=1 viral share / DAU-week; clean donation reconciliation.

gates.name: Global-launch gate
gates.passCriteria: Soft KPIs held 4 wks at scale; infra cost/DAU stable; crash-free >=99.5%; transparency badge live.

gates.name: Live-ops recurring gate (quarterly)
gates.passCriteria: D30 >=10%; sub conversion >=2%; IAP-payer >=1.5%; donation volume up + quarterly Impact Report shipped; 'noticed AI repetition' & 'felt guilt-tripped' leading-churn metrics within bounds; sustainable cadence.

assetBudget.style: Live2D Cubism, 1 rig per species. Fallback: Spine 2D-skeletal. NO custom 3D.
assetBudget.heroSpend: 2 commissioned Live2D rigs @ $1,200–$2,000 each. Lock design with AI concept (Midjourney) BEFORE paying for rig. Add 15–20% contingency for rig revision rounds.

totalUniqueAssets.breakdown: 2 rigs + 6 life-stage skins; 12 emotion motions [0 new art]; 4 environments; 25 props; 30 cosmetics; ~52 UI/icons/widgets; 12 FX; ~48 audio; 5 music. Rest derived via rig params + palette-swaps.

disciplineRules: day/night/weather = shader tints on same 4 BGs
reallocate from music/SFX before EVER cutting rig quality

careMeters.noDeathFloor: Hard floor at 'sad but safe'; pet can NEVER die/suffer irreversibly.
careMeters.moodStates: ~4 mood states; low meters only dampen Bond gain, never reverse it.

currencies.name: Compassion Coins
currencies.description: Non-purchasable-for-power, non-tradeable, non-convertible, zero gameplay power, maps 1:1 to real outcomes (e.g. 50 Coins = 1 real meal).

monetizationStreams.design: Rewarded-first, opt-in, ~4–6/day cap; max 1 interstitial/session at natural breaks; never mid-emotion; kids see contextual-only or none; every watch mints Compassion Coins.
$5.99/mo · $39.99/yr; removes interstitials, daily Kibble, monthly Heartstones + Coins, cosmetic drip, higher donation match.
Horizontal cosmetics only; direct-purchase; NO gacha/loot boxes.
Stated split (e.g. 70% donation / 30% cosmetic+fee), disclosed pre-purchase + receipt.

donationModel.summary: Transparent Pooled Allocation with 1:1 Impact Mapping. % of NET revenue (net of store fees 15–30%, processing, ad-network cut) -> segregated auditable Impact Pool ledger -> disbursed on fixed cadence through an established giving-platform intermediary (PayPal Giving Fund / Percent / Benevity) to 1–3 vetted partners.
donationModel.netModelIllustrative: rewarded-ad 5%, IAP/sub 5–10%, Rescue Bundles ~70% of bundle price. 'X% of revenue' claims always stated NET.
donationModel.noDonationIAP: NO donation-IAP, NO player tax-deductible donations in MVP. Compassion Coins represent pooled intent, not personal deductible gifts.
donationModel.hardEthicalWall: Never tie the virtual pet's wellbeing/survival to real donations; never guilt-frame. Free players still generate real impact via ad-funded daily 'kind act' Coins.
trustPillars: single version-stamped Impact Pledge doc = SSOT
segregated ledger + neutral intermediary = trust in process not founder's word
Rescue Wall shows lifetime/personal real $, live campaign bars, dated downloadable receipts, partner acknowledgments
outcome-based claims, always rounded DOWN, under-promise/over-deliver
explicit donated-vs-cosmetic+fee split on every bundle
third-party 'Impact verified through <date>' badge past volume threshold

antiFraudMVP: server-side mint-gating (S2S signed ad postbacks; Apple/Google receipt validation)
clawback Coins + revoke badges on refund/chargeback (disburse only after settlement window)

ltvAssumptions.cac: near-zero at launch — growth must be organic/viral; paid UA only after sub LTV > CAC proven
ltvAssumptions.keySensitivity: LLM cost/DAU must stay well below ARPDAU (target <35%) — enforced by caching, hybrid pre-gen, small models, token caps, subscriber-funded live chat

techStack.engine: Flutter + Live2D SDK — LOCKED at G0 (founder decision 2026-06-22; resolves Open Decision #1, D-048). Live2D Cubism has no first-party Flutter runtime; Rive is the authorized fallback if the P1 integration spike runs hot (the PetRenderer abstraction makes it a backend swap). Native widget interop via WidgetKit/Glance.
techStack.backend: Firebase — LOCKED at G0 (founder decision 2026-06-22; resolves ADR-003, D-049). Managed BaaS: auth, Firestore cloud save, Remote Config, Analytics, Crashlytics. No owned servers.
techStack.llmStrategy: Hybrid: offline LLM pre-generates large human-reviewed dialogue bank; runtime selects by pet-state + injects structured memory facts into cached persona prompt. Live free-form LLM DEFERRED & gated (adult-verified + subscriber + token caps ~60–100 out + daily turn caps + per-user cost ceiling). Models LOCKED at G0 (D-050): runtime/live = claude-haiku-4-5 (founder: 'Claude Haiku 4'); offline pre-gen = claude-opus-4-8. LLM cost/DAU modeled at 2.7% (MVP) / 3.9% (soft-launch live pilot) of ARPDAU — well under the 35% gate (docs/LLM_UNIT_ECONOMICS_MODEL.md). This is the make-or-break OPEX model.
techStack.aiMemory: Structured key-value fact store (10–30 durable facts) in BaaS DB + short rolling turn window + batched off-peak fact extraction. Surfaced as the Memory Book. Reliability > breadth.
techStack.moderation: Two-sided input + output through cheap moderation/classification endpoint; hard system-prompt constraints; fixed safe-fallback line; self-harm -> static safe message; full audit logging. Under-13: templated/non-generative only.
techStack.onDeviceVsCloud: Sim runs client-side (deterministic, elapsed-time, server-validatable). Memory/entitlements/donation-ledger server-side. Voice mimic (deferred) = on-device DSP only, audio never leaves device.
techStack.saveSync: Authoritative cloud save keyed to Apple/Google sign-in (+ guest). Local-first, single-device last-write-wins for MVP; defer true multi-device live sync. Version every schema + automated migration + restore flow. No update may orphan a pet.
techStack.payments: RevenueCat — single abstraction over StoreKit + Play Billing; receipt validation, entitlements, restore.
techStack.ads: Standard mediation SDK (AdMob/ironSource) with COPPA/kids flags; rewarded-first. Drop personalized ads for under-13.
techStack.widgets: Native iOS WidgetKit + Android Glance/AppWidget. Single shared 'pet status snapshot' payload feeds widget + notification scheduler. Pre-rendered mood images. Lock-screen/Live Activities deferred.
techStack.notifications: Local-scheduled (no push cost) in MVP; FCM/APNs templated pet-voiced lines, 1–2/day cap.
techStack.analytics: Managed (Firebase/GameAnalytics), ~15 events mapped to funnel gates, privacy-by-design, no PII.

personas.name: Maya
personas.oneLine: Gen-Z TikTok Casual, 19, 60–120s bursts, screenshot-first, zero tolerance for cringe/latency/repetition

personas.name: David
personas.oneLine: Busy Adult Pet-Lover, 37, real rescue dog, widget-anchored, low-guilt, pays for calm+ad-free

personas.name: Priya
personas.oneLine: Socially-Conscious Donor, 29, nonprofit, scrutinizes donation mechanics, trust-gated

personas.name: Tom
personas.oneLine: Lapsed Tamagotchi Nostalgic, 34, stress-tests AI-memory authenticity, allergic to predatory F2P

personas.name: Leo & Parent
personas.oneLine: Kid Under Supervision, 9 + cautious parent; parent vets AI safety, wants voice mimic

viralityMechanics.name: Unprompted Comfort
viralityMechanics.description: Pet notices low mood, offers care unasked -> 'an AI pet comforted me' card.

viralityMechanics.name: Long Memory Callback
viralityMechanics.description: Surfaces a weeks-old personal fact -> 'it remembered' card.

viralityMechanics.name: Before/After Growth
viralityMechanics.description: Auto split-card, scared rescue vs. thriving Grown, elapsed days.

viralityMechanics.name: Rescue/Gotcha-Day Milestones
viralityMechanics.description: 'Forever home' ceremony card at peak pride.

viralityMechanics.name: Real-Impact Celebration
viralityMechanics.description: Verified named-shelter impact badge 'I helped real animals.'

viralityMechanics.name: Widget Candids
viralityMechanics.description: Endearing home/lock-screen moment screenshotted directly; widget IS the ambient ad.

viralityMechanics.name: Naming/Personality Reveal
viralityMechanics.description: 'Only MY pet would say this,' singular per player.

headlineRetentionTargets.worstCase: If AI memory disappoints: D30 -> ~5–6% (genre median).

perPhase.G1: Loop 'fun' qualitative pass; deterministic sim + offline-catch-up tests green; zero neglect-guilt.
perPhase.G2: Persona 'tell a friend' qualitative pass; AI memory callback reliability >=95% (no hallucinated facts); first-AI-line latency = 0 spinner; rig cost on-budget.
perPhase.G3: D1 >=40% · D7 >=18%; 0 child-safety incidents; cloud-restore proven; LLM cost/DAU within model; crash-free >=99%.
perPhase.G4: D1 >=42% · D7 >=20% · D30 >=10%; ARPDAU >=$0.03; LLM cost/DAU < 35% ARPDAU; >=1 viral share / DAU-week; clean donation reconciliation.
perPhase.G5: Soft KPIs held 4 wks at scale; infra cost/DAU stable; crash-free >=99.5%; transparency badge live.
perPhase.G6: D30 >=10%; sub conversion >=2%; IAP-payer >=1.5%; donation volume up + quarterly Impact Report shipped; leading-churn metrics within bounds; sustainable cadence.

risks.description: Kids-compliance (COPPA/GDPR-K/store kids policy) — existential; detonated by AI chat, voice capture, ad targeting.
risks.mitigation: Build to child-safe standard for ALL users; hybrid (templated under-13, no free-text storage from minors); no behavioral ad targeting; mandatory budgeted pre-launch legal review (gate G3).

risks.description: Unbounded LLM OPEX scales with engagement (anti-F2P economics).
risks.mitigation: Hybrid pre-gen + structured memory; small/cheap model; prompt-caching; token + daily-turn caps; live chat subscriber-only & age-gated; gate G4 on cost/DAU < 35% ARPDAU.

risks.description: AI-memory authenticity — the single load-bearing feature; flaky recall = 'theater'/'mid'/'unsafe' across personas.
risks.mitigation: Engineer narrow+reliable memory over broad+flaky; tangible Memory Book artifact as provable trust signal; >=95% callback reliability gate at G2; anti-repetition rotation system.

risks.description: Save loss / pet 'death' = refund + 1-star + broken trust.
risks.mitigation: Authoritative versioned cloud save + automated migration + restore flow; no-death decay floor so pet can never suffer irreversibly.

risks.description: Donation legal/charity-washing — vague/coercive = public backlash (Priya) + regulatory.
risks.mitigation: % NET-revenue pledge via vetted intermediary; named partners + receipts + verification badge; hard ethical wall; lawyer review of revenue-share claim; NO donation IAP.

risks.description: Neglect-guilt / punitive streaks churn highest-LTV personas + violate cozy brand.
risks.mitigation: 'Pet missed you but is okay' longing model; Streak Warmth (freeze/repair); never punish absence.
1 modular Live2D rig/species; 3 stages via param/scale; overlay cosmetics + palette-swap; defer 2nd species at G2 if hot; never under-budget the rig.

risks.description: Live-ops content treadmill exceeds solo+AI capacity -> post-launch churn.
risks.mitigation: Remote-config/data-driven event infra in MVP; honestly low launch cadence (1 small moment / 6–8 wks); core loop retains via bond/memory, not new content.
RevenueCat for billing; single shared status payload -> one widget/platform; local notifications MVP; defer lock-screen/Live Activities.

risks.description: Negative virality — one tone-deaf/unsafe AI screenshot defines the brand.
risks.mitigation: Hard guardrails + child-safe persona lock + per-turn moderation; many small authentic moments over one engineered spectacle; under-13 templated-only.

openDecisions.resolution: Flutter + Live2D SDK (Rive fallback authorized if Live2D-on-Flutter blocked). See D-048.
openDecisions.note: Bias to fastest solo+AI shipping path with native widget interop.
Based on rig-pipeline cost burn (budget for 2; ship 1 if hot).

openDecisions.decision: LLM provider + exact model tiers and final token/turn caps
openDecisions.resolution: Anthropic Claude; runtime/live = claude-haiku-4-5, offline pre-gen = claude-opus-4-8 (D-050). Final token/turn caps validated at G3/G4.
openDecisions.note: Cheap routine model vs. live-chat model.

openDecisions.decision: Donation intermediary choice + initial 1–3 partner shelters
openDecisions.note: PayPal Giving Fund vs Percent vs Benevity; must be live for soft launch.
Finalize with accounting/legal; lock in Impact Pledge doc.

openDecisions.decision: Launch localization languages (which 4–6 for static UI)
openDecisions.note: AI-dialogue languages stay EN(+1–2), expand post-launch per-language safety validation.

openDecisions.decision: Subscription final price point ($5.99 assumed) + Care Pass pricing
Under-13 handling: neutral age gate vs. fully child-safe-for-all
openDecisions.note: Legal determination of child-directedness drives this.

openDecisions.decision: Live free-form chat go/no-go for adults
openDecisions.note: Decide expand/hold on cost + safety data.

consolidationRules: Each fact lives in exactly ONE canonical document; all other documents cross-link rather than duplicate.
current_state.json is the machine-readable single source of truth for live project state.
No document may contradict another; the Canonical Decision Brief (KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md) wins on conflict.
State must be updated on every major decision.
All cross-links use the real on-disk filenames recorded in canonicalFilenameMap; retired/invented aliases must not appear.

decisionLog.decision: Brief v1.0 LOCKED; committed as SSOT root on-disk.
decisionLog.rationale: Reconciled all specialist conflicts; canonical seed and authority-chain root.

decisionLog.decision: Resolve systemic cross-reference incoherence: pick ONE canonical filename per document and normalize every cross-link in all six docs + the brief to the real on-disk names.
decisionLog.old: Docs cited mutually-inconsistent, nonexistent sibling filenames (e.g. GAME_DESIGN_SYSTEMS.md, GAME_ECONOMY_MONETIZATION.md, GAME_ART_AUDIO_BIBLE.md, GAME_GTM_VIRALITY.md, GAME_DESIGN.md, GAME_ECONOMY.md, GAME_ART_BIBLE.md, GAME_IMPACT_TRUST.md, GAME_AI_COMPANION.md, GAME_DONATION_IMPACT.md, GAME_GTM_LIVEOPS.md, AI_COMPANION_AND_SAFETY.md, ART_AUDIO_AND_ASSET_BUDGET.md, DONATION_TRUST_AND_IMPACT.md, LIVEOPS_AND_GROWTH.md, GAME_IMPACT_DONATION.md, GAME_ART_ASSET_PLAN.md, GAME_DESIGN_SPEC.md, GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md, GAME_AI_COMPANION_SYSTEM.md, GAME_DONATION_IMPACT_SYSTEM.md, GAME_ART_ASSET_PRODUCTION.md).
decisionLog.new: Canonical filenames: KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md, GAMEPLAY_AND_PROGRESSION_BIBLE.md, GAME_TECHNICAL_SYSTEMS.md, GAME_CONTENT_FACTORY.md, GAME_DECISION_LOG.md, GAME_MASTER_EXECUTION_ROADMAP.md, GAME_EXECUTION_MASTER_SYSTEM.md. Map recorded in canonicalFilenameMap; EXECUTION_MASTER_SYSTEM §3 Document Map corrected to match.
decisionLog.rationale: DRY 'cross-link, do not duplicate' architecture was non-navigable. One canonical name per doc restores navigability and lets the Consistency Auditor (EXECUTION_MASTER_SYSTEM §13) run against a coherent set.

decisionLog.decision: Commit the Canonical Decision Brief to game-os/ as KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md and normalize every doc's reference to that exact name.
decisionLog.old: SSOT root missing on-disk; docs named the brief variously (KINDREDPAWS_CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF without .md, CANONICAL_DECISION_BRIEF.md, prose 'Canonical Decision Brief'). Authority chain had a missing root link.
decisionLog.new: Brief committed; ssotRootStatus = committed; authority chain brief -> current_state.json -> docs is now mechanically enforceable.
decisionLog.rationale: 'The brief wins all conflicts' could not be enforced and downstream could not verify against the SSOT without the root file present under a single agreed filename.

decisionLog.decision: P0/G0: Lock engine = Flutter + Live2D SDK; backend = Firebase; LLM runtime = claude-haiku-4-5 (pre-gen claude-opus-4-8). Resolves Open Decision #1 and the model half of #3 (founder decisions, 2026-06-22).
decisionLog.old: Engine, backend, and LLM tiers were open (brief §12 OD-1, OD-3); brief listed Unity-or-Flutter and Firebase-or-Supabase.
decisionLog.new: Flutter+Live2D / Firebase / Claude Haiku 4 locked. Recorded as D-048/D-049/D-050 in GAME_DECISION_LOG.md; ADR-001 PROPOSED->LOCKED, ADR-003 ACCEPTED->LOCKED. Brief stays v1.0 (locked seed); resolutions live in this mirror + the decision log.
decisionLog.rationale: Founder ratified the brief and chose the stack to start Phase 0; the SSOT brief is immutable, so resolved open-decisions are recorded downstream per the update protocol.

decisionLog.decision: P0 engineering deliverables complete: LLM unit-economics model v1 (G0 criterion #3 PASS — 2.7%/3.9% of ARPDAU); tech stack provisioned (Flutter architecture skeleton + service abstractions + mocks + gated Firebase seam); versioned-save migration/restore framework (R4); Heartmind/memory/dialogue schemas; analytics taxonomy; remote-config defaults; PetRenderer abstraction. Rig design brief + legal scoping + Impact Pledge skeleton + REQUIRED_ENVIRONMENTS authored.
decisionLog.new: G0 status: engineering-complete; 2 founder/credentialed actions remain (secure rig contractor, book legal review) — both fully enabled by delivered docs. Validated: flutter analyze clean, 31 tests pass @76.4% coverage, APK build + emulator E2E green.
decisionLog.rationale: Phase 0 (Pre-production) is design/provision/model, not gameplay; the playable core loop is Phase 1 (G1) and intentionally NOT started.

nextActions.action: Ratify the Canonical Decision Brief v1.0 and confirm this current_state.json as the live SSOT (P0/G0 prerequisite).
Decide the engine: Unity (2D) vs Flutter + Live2D SDK — pick the fastest solo+AI shipping path with native widget interop (Open Decision 1, resolve at G0).
Build the LLM unit-economics model v1: project cost/DAU at the hybrid pre-gen + capped-live mix; prove it stays < ARPDAU (G0 pass criterion; R2 mitigation).
Generate Live2D rig concept art via AI (Midjourney) for puppy + kitten; lock the design BEFORE commissioning rigs; secure a rig contractor (G0 pass criterion; R7 mitigation).
Book the child-directedness legal review (COPPA/GDPR-K/store kids policy) — scope determination of under-13 handling (G0 pass criterion; R1 mitigation).
Provision the managed BaaS (Firebase or Supabase): auth, DB, cloud save, remote config — and scaffold versioned-save migration/restore layer with AI agents (R4 mitigation).
Stand up RevenueCat and ads mediation SDK accounts (child-safe config flags) as provisioning groundwork for P3.
Draft the version-stamped Impact Pledge doc skeleton and shortlist donation intermediaries (PayPal Giving Fund / Percent / Benevity) for the G4 deadline (Open Decisions 4 & 5).
